title: Failed to inspect image with  invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
body:
When trying to inspect a container image I get
` FATA[0003] runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference `

I can only guess that some metadata are not present in the image, a nil pointer error is triggered and skopeo isn't catching it.

So far I have only seen it with docker.io/cern/cc7-base:latest , sample execution:
`# skopeo inspect docker://docker.io/cern/cc7-base:latest
FATA[0003] runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference 
`  

I think that skopeo shouldn't crash and catch the error.

comments.body:
Seeing the same with `skopeo` in F27

```
# rpm -q skopeo
skopeo-0.1.24-6.dev.git28d4e08.fc27.x86_64

# skopeo inspect docker://docker.io/cern/cc7-base:latest
FATA[0000] runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference 

# skopeo --debug inspect docker://docker.io/cern/cc7-base:latest
DEBU[0000] Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/docker.io 
DEBU[0000] Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration 
DEBU[0000]  Using "default-docker" configuration        
DEBU[0000]  No signature storage configuration found for docker.io/cern/cc7-base:latest 
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/         
DEBU[0000] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ err <nil> 
DEBU[0000] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ status 401 
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/cern/cc7-base/manifests/latest 
DEBU[0000] Downloading /v2/cern/cc7-base/blobs/sha256:eb51ff155a284ccbc82661bf4510bc389b91fe221215ff668dac3745736b4abf 
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/cern/cc7-base/blobs/sha256:eb51ff155a284ccbc82661bf4510bc389b91fe221215ff668dac3745736b4abf 
FATA[0000] runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference 
```

I got the same error when building from master in a container and running the command:

```
# git rev-parse HEAD
5436111796e76dc54dc5b8f374c5aaa2ef1c96f9

# ./skopeo --version
skopeo version 0.1.24-dev commit: 5436111796e76dc54dc5b8f374c5aaa2ef1c96f9

# ./skopeo --debug inspect docker://docker.io/cern/cc7-base:latest
DEBU[0000] Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/docker.io 
DEBU[0000] Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration 
DEBU[0000]  No signature storage configuration found for docker.io/cern/cc7-base:latest 
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/         
DEBU[0000] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ err <nil> 
DEBU[0000] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ status 401 
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/cern/cc7-base/manifests/latest 
DEBU[0000] Downloading /v2/cern/cc7-base/blobs/sha256:eb51ff155a284ccbc82661bf4510bc389b91fe221215ff668dac3745736b4abf 
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/cern/cc7-base/blobs/sha256:eb51ff155a284ccbc82661bf4510bc389b91fe221215ff668dac3745736b4abf 
FATA[0004] runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference 
```
